response.step_by_step_log:
1. 00:00-01:52: Detected a vocal musical performance. On-screen text '不安定な神様' identified the song. Performers are Hakui Koyori and Suara.
2. Performed web search for '不安定な神様 Suara lyrics' to retrieve full lyrics.
3. 01:52-end: Performance ends, followed by a conversation about the Utawarerumono game series.
response.global_summary: The video features a live musical performance by VTuber Hakui Koyori and singer Suara, performing the opening theme song '不安定な神様' (Fuantei na Kamisama) from the anime 'Utawarerumono: Mask of Deception', followed by a conversation about the game series.

scenes.description: Live performance of the song '不安定な神様' (Fuantei na Kamisama) by VTuber Hakui Koyori and original singer Suara. Performance features dancing and concert lighting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
不安定な神様
繰り返す出会いと別れ
また会えるその日まで
時かける旅人
あなたが泣いている
流るる涙の雨
泣くなとは言わない
心かなしくて

生きとし生けるもの
何かを背負いながら
見えない鎖に
繋がれている
どれほど
救われただろう
あどけない笑顔を
なくしたくはない

不安定な神様
繰り返す過去と未来
生まれ そして死んで行く運命(さだめ)
駆け違えた世界で
繰り返す出会いと別れ
また会えるその日まで
時かける旅人
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unstable God
Repeated encounters and partings
Until the day we can meet again
A traveler crossing time
You are crying
Like rain of falling tears
I won't say 'don't cry'
Because it makes my heart sad

Living things
While carrying something
Bound by invisible chains
How much
Have I been saved
I don't want to lose
That innocent smile

Unstable God
Repeating past and future
Born, and then a destiny to die
In a world of crossed paths
Repeated encounters and partings
Until the day we can meet again
A traveler crossing time

scenes.description: The performers finish the song and proceed to converse on stage about the 'Utawarerumono' series and their experience performing together.
